contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Telegram bot UX: persistent typing, Markdown→HTML rendering, dao_protocol allowlist
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/48
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/49
  
  Details:
  Polished the Telegram bot after multi-round landed:
  - truesight_autopilot#48: (1) typing keepalive — multi-round answers take 30-60s+ but Telegram's typing indicator expires at ~5s; call_chat now runs in a worker thread while the main loop re-sends sendChatAction every 4s, so the indicator stays alive (fixes the 'dead gap then reply' feel). (2) Markdown->Telegram HTML — model emits ##/**/-/code which Telegram showed raw; markdown_to_telegram_html() maps headings/bold/bullets/code/links to HTML (parse_mode=HTML) with plain-text fallback on any parse/thread error. (3) Added dao_protocol to allowed_repos + ALLOWED_CHAT_REPOS.
  - truesight_autopilot#49: fixed nested <b><b> when a heading also contains **bold** (Telegram 400s on it, would force plain-text fallback).
  18 unit tests pass; deployed to prod EC2; verified render output + dao_protocol live in prod allowlist.
  
  PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/48 , https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/49
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00

- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
